title: Dropdown - Reading the dropdown existing labels
excerpt:
I run into a situation where I need to get possible labels in the dropdown column through API. 
Is there an option to get that values?

posts.author: mpsujek (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I run into a situation where I need to get possible labels in the dropdown column through API.
Is there an option to get that values?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @mpsujek,

Yes! You can get the possible labels in a dropdown column with a query like this one:

{
  boards(ids: 1234567890) {
    columns(ids: "dropdown_9") {
      settings_str
    }
  }
}

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: mpsujek (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank You that’s help

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I am glad it does

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
